description_long: This is a large, multi-level open shelving unit constructed with a series of horizontal platforms supported by vertical posts. The structure features three main shelf levels, each with varying depths and overhangs, creating a staggered, modernist appearance. The open design allows for visibility and access from multiple sides, with no enclosed compartments or doors. The shelves are supported by slender, evenly spaced legs, giving the unit an elevated and airy look. The material appears to be a uniform, matte-finished metal, suggesting durability and suitability for urban or industrial environments. The overall form is geometric and modular, making it ideal for use as public storage, display, or organizational furniture in urban settings.
description: A large, open, multi-level metal shelving unit with staggered shelves and slender supporting legs, featuring a modern, geometric design.
description_view_0: Front-facing view showing the staggered shelf arrangement and the open, multi-level structure with visible supporting legs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth and overhang of the shelves, as well as the open, accessible design.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the shelves and the supporting framework, with the staggered levels clearly visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizing the shelf overhangs and the uniform spacing of the supporting legs.
